label: pipeline_quality_log
definition:
DAY-partitioned quality log. Pre-Dataform gate: validates silver_smart_money pair count=27, all_features freshness <48h, no duplicates, no NULL bias. gate_status=PASS unblocks Dataform gold trigger. gate_status=BLOCKED skips ml_ready rebuild.

**Live BQ stats** (as of 2026-04-19 06:38 UTC): 72 rows · 7 columns
long_description:
## pipeline_quality_log

**Layer:** Gate

**Rows:** 72  |  **Columns:** 7  |  **Last modified:** 2026-04-19 06:38 UTC

DAY-partitioned quality log. Pre-Dataform gate: validates silver_smart_money pair count=27, all_features freshness <48h, no duplicates, no NULL bias. gate_status=PASS unblocks Dataform gold trigger. gate_status=BLOCKED skips ml_ready rebuild.

**Gate contract:** Exit 0 = PASS (Dataform proceeds). Exit 1 = BLOCKED (Dataform skipped, ml_ready not rebuilt).

label: chronos_large_forecasts
definition:
Chronos 2 Large (amazon/chronos-t5-large) daily forecasts. 27 pairs × 30 horizon days = 810 rows/run. Columns: q10/q50/q90/mean_forecast, trend_direction, trend_strength_pct. Plus 37 covariate cols from chronos_input. Runs on L4 GPU Cloud Run (europe-west1). DAY partitioned, clustered pair/horizon_day.

**Live BQ stats** (as of 2026-04-19 04:19 UTC): 6,480 rows · 37 columns
long_description:

Plus 37 covariate cols from chronos_input. Runs on L4 GPU Cloud Run (europe-west1). DAY partitioned, clustered pair/horizon_day.

**Inference:** Cloud Run job. Reads Gold tables, writes forecast output to BQ.

long_description:

Nixtla TimeGPT macro regime forecasts. 27 pairs × 21-day horizon in 1 API call. 24 exogenous features: yields, COT, ADR, STDV, CBDR, MA, carry, CME futures volume, Williams %R, coiling, VWAP, ATR ratio. q10/q50/q90 + trend_direction/strength. DATE partitioned, clustered pair.

**Inference:** Cloud Run job. Reads Gold tables, writes forecast output to BQ.

label: outcome_evaluation
definition: BQ view joining T-7 model predictions (Chronos q50/direction + TimeGPT q50/direction) against actual ml_ready outcomes (close at T). Computes direction_correct (bool), mae, direction_confidence_delta. Training signal for RF meta-learner. Only populated when pipeline_quality_log = PASS for trailing 5 days.
long_description:
## outcome_evaluation

**Layer:** Meta

BQ view joining T-7 model predictions (Chronos q50/direction + TimeGPT q50/direction) against actual ml_ready outcomes (close at T). Computes direction_correct (bool), mae, direction_confidence_delta. Training signal for RF meta-learner. Only populated when pipeline_quality_log = PASS for trailing 5 days.

**Status:** Planned. Runs Saturday only when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for trailing 5 days.

label: rf_calibration
definition: Weekly XGBoost meta-learner output. Trains on 273 ml_ready features + model predictions → actual outcome labels. Outputs per-pair confidence calibration weights: when to trust Chronos vs TimeGPT, which feature domains dominate in current regime (COT/macro/ICT/session). Stored in BQ, consumed by knowledge graph edge weights. Runs Saturday only when gate=PASS for trailing week.
long_description:
## rf_calibration

**Layer:** Meta

Weekly XGBoost meta-learner output. Trains on 273 ml_ready features + model predictions → actual outcome labels. Outputs per-pair confidence calibration weights: when to trust Chronos vs TimeGPT, which feature domains dominate in current regime (COT/macro/ICT/session). Stored in BQ, consumed by knowledge graph edge weights. Runs Saturday only when gate=PASS for trailing week.

**Status:** Planned. Runs Saturday only when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for trailing 5 days.

label: ict_rag (planned)
definition: ICT concept embeddings from YouTube transcript corpus. Vector store of ICT trading concepts (OB, FVG, BOS, STDV, dealing ranges, COT interpretation) queryable by model inference context. Enables LLM macro regime layer to ground predictions in ICT doctrine.
long_description:
## ict_rag (planned)

**Layer:** RAG

ICT concept embeddings from YouTube transcript corpus. Vector store of ICT trading concepts (OB, FVG, BOS, STDV, dealing ranges, COT interpretation) queryable by model inference context. Enables LLM macro regime layer to ground predictions in ICT doctrine.

**Status:** Planned. ICT concept corpus not yet ingested.

label: validate-pipeline (09:55 UTC)
definition: Cloud Run job. Pre-Dataform gate: 5 BQ checks (pair count=27, freshness <48h ×2, no duplicates, no NULL bias). Writes PASS/BLOCKED to pipeline_quality_log. Exit 1 blocks Dataform trigger. Mon-Fri 09:55 UTC.
long_description:
## validate-pipeline (09:55 UTC)

**Layer:** Gate

Cloud Run job. Pre-Dataform gate: 5 BQ checks (pair count=27, freshness <48h ×2, no duplicates, no NULL bias). Writes PASS/BLOCKED to pipeline_quality_log. Exit 1 blocks Dataform trigger. Mon-Fri 09:55 UTC.

**Gate contract:** Exit 0 = PASS (Dataform proceeds). Exit 1 = BLOCKED (Dataform skipped, ml_ready not rebuilt).

label: dataform-gold-trigger (10:00 UTC)
definition: Cloud Run job. Reads pipeline_quality_log gate. If PASS: triggers dataform-only Cloud Workflow (compile → invoke silver+gold tags). All 16 Dataform actions must SUCCEED including 3 assertions. Mon-Fri 10:00 UTC.
long_description:
## dataform-gold-trigger (10:00 UTC)

**Layer:** Scheduler

Cloud Run job. Reads pipeline_quality_log gate. If PASS: triggers dataform-only Cloud Workflow (compile → invoke silver+gold tags). All 16 Dataform actions must SUCCEED including 3 assertions. Mon-Fri 10:00 UTC.

**Infrastructure:** Google Cloud Run Job + Cloud Scheduler. europe-west2 region unless noted.

label: chronos-large-daily (10:15 UTC)

definition: Cloud Run job. Downloads CFTC Legacy COT combined file (deacom.txt + year ZIP). Upserts to cot_data via BQ MERGE on (pair, report_date). Saturday 16:00 UTC.

label: rf-meta-weekly (Sat, gate-gated)
definition: Planned Cloud Run job. Runs Saturday after Chronos weekly. Trains XGBoost meta-learner on outcome_evaluation (T-7 predictions vs actuals). Only executes when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for all 5 trailing trading days. Writes confidence calibration to rf_calibration.
long_description:
## rf-meta-weekly (Sat, gate-gated)

**Layer:** Meta

Planned Cloud Run job. Runs Saturday after Chronos weekly. Trains XGBoost meta-learner on outcome_evaluation (T-7 predictions vs actuals). Only executes when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for all 5 trailing trading days. Writes confidence calibration to rf_calibration.

**Status:** Planned. Runs Saturday only when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for trailing 5 days.
